leagueBriefing: Friday delivered conference-race stakes and tournament chaos across men's college hoops: St. John's locked up at least a share of the Big East title, Miami (Ohio) finished a perfect regular season, and multiple conference tournaments opened with upset pressure and late-game drama.

games.headline: St. John's grinds past Seton Hall to clinch share of Big East crown
games.brief: No. 18 St. John's had to win this one the hard way, but the Red Storm still got the job done and secured at least a share of a second straight Big East regular-season title. Zuby Ejiofor steadied the offense late after foul trouble, and Rick Pitino's group kept control in crunch time.
bullets: Zuby Ejiofor scored 21 points, including 12 in the second half.
St. John's improved to 25-6 overall and 18-2 in Big East play.
The Red Storm have back-to-back regular-season Big East titles for the first time in 40 years.
Seton Hall's Adam Clark scored 15 points; the Pirates fell to 0-6 against the league's top three teams.
St. John's shot 65.2% in the second half.
games.context: St. John's is locked in as the top seed in the Big East Tournament at Madison Square Garden and can still win the regular-season title outright.

highlights.title: Seton Hall vs. Kansas State Game Highlights | 2025-26 Big 12 Men's Basketball

games.headline: Miami (Ohio) finishes perfect regular season at 31-0 after OT thriller
games.brief: Miami (Ohio) completed an unbeaten regular season, but it needed another clutch finish to do it. The RedHawks survived a wild overtime game in Athens and closed 31-0, giving the program a historic mark that now shifts pressure to March where the NCAA bid still may require a conference title.
bullets: Miami (Ohio) became the first unbeaten Division I men's regular-season team since Gonzaga in 2021.
Eian Elmer posted a career-high 32 points with 12 rebounds.
Peter Suder scored five points in overtime, including late free throws that put Miami ahead.
Ohio's Jackson Paveletzke scored a career-high 37 points in the loss.
Miami finished 18-0 in the MAC and is the top seed in the conference tournament.
games.context: The RedHawks have a perfect regular-season résumé, but conference tournament results still likely determine whether they are safely in the NCAA field.

highlights.title: Miami (OH) RedHawks vs. Ohio Bobcats | Full Game Highlights | ESPN College Basketball

games.headline: No. 9 Drake shocks top-seeded Belmont in MVC tournament stunner
games.brief: Drake ripped up the bracket with a historic upset, hammering No. 1 seed Belmont and becoming the first No. 9 seed to beat a top seed in Missouri Valley tournament history. Jalen Quinn's scoring burst and a huge second half turned this into a runaway.
bullets: Jalen Quinn scored 31 points for Drake.
Drake became the first No. 9 seed to beat a No. 1 seed in MVC Tournament history.
Owen Larson added 25 points, 8 rebounds and 8 assists.
The Bulldogs outscored Belmont by 12 in the second half.
Belmont entered 26-6 but was overwhelmed after halftime.
games.context: After entering the tournament on an eight-game skid, Drake now has back-to-back wins and serious upset momentum.

games.headline: Winthrop steals quarterfinal late with furious final-45-second finish
games.brief: Winthrop looked cooked late, then flipped the game in a blink. The Eagles closed the final 45 seconds with defensive pressure, a tying sequence and Logan Duncomb's go-ahead layup to survive Charleston Southern and move on in the Big South bracket.
bullets: Winthrop trailed 81-74 with 45 seconds left, then ended on a 12-0 closing run.
Logan Duncomb scored 20 points and hit the go-ahead layup with 16 seconds left.
Cody Clouet added 19 points and 9 rebounds, going 9-for-9 at the line.
A'lahn Sumler scored 22 for Charleston Southern.
No. 2 seed Winthrop advanced to the Big South semifinals.
games.context: This comeback keeps Winthrop's title path alive and reinforces how volatile one-possession conference tournament games can get.

games.headline: FGCU controls Lipscomb from the jump to punch semifinal ticket
games.brief: FGCU never let this quarterfinal breathe. The Eagles grabbed the lead in the opening minute, built separation before halftime and then buried Lipscomb with a second-half run to advance with one of the more decisive tournament wins of the day.
bullets: Rahmir Barno scored 18 points on 7-of-10 shooting.
Isaiah Malone added 17 points and 6 rebounds for FGCU.
FGCU used a 15-0 second-half run to turn a five-point margin into a 20-point lead.
Lipscomb was held to 53 points after entering at 19-13.
No. 5 seed FGCU advanced to face top-seeded Central Arkansas.
games.context: FGCU's wire-to-wire win gives it real confidence heading into a semifinal against the tournament favorite.

highlights.title: Ole Miss vs. NC State Game Highlights | 2025-26 ACC Men's Basketball

games.headline: Merrimack locks down Sacred Heart to advance in MAAC quarterfinal
games.brief: Merrimack turned this quarterfinal into a defensive clinic after taking the lead in the first half. Kevair Kennedy drove everything offensively, and the Warriors never let Sacred Heart generate enough clean offense to make this a game late.
bullets: Kevair Kennedy posted 24 points, 8 rebounds and 6 assists.
Merrimack led 39-25 at halftime and never trailed after the 11:20 mark of the first half.
Ernest Shelton added 18 points and 9 rebounds.
Sacred Heart was held to 48 points in a lopsided quarterfinal result.
Merrimack advanced to a Sunday MAAC semifinal.
games.context: Merrimack's balance and defensive control put it in strong position entering the semifinal round.

games.headline: Akron routs Northern Illinois to close regular season on seven-game streak
games.brief: Akron treated its regular-season finale like a statement game, jumping on Northern Illinois early and never relenting. The Zips' shot quality and defensive pressure separated this one quickly, extending their winning streak and reinforcing their form entering tournament play.
bullets: Akron won 94-55 to push its winning streak to seven.
Bowen Hardman led the Zips with 20 points on 7-of-8 shooting (5-of-6 from 3).
Akron led 47-27 at halftime and never trailed after the opening 38 seconds.
Amani Lyles added 17 points on 6-of-7 shooting.
Northern Illinois fell to 9-21 overall and 4-14 in MAC play.
games.context: Akron enters the MAC tournament with momentum and one of the league's strongest late-season profiles.

highlights.title: Bowling Green at Michigan State | Highlights | Big Ten Men's Basketball | 11/16/2024

games.headline: Bradley survives Valparaiso in double overtime behind Johnson and Jonovic
games.brief: Bradley needed extra basketball and then more of it, but the Braves eventually outlasted Valparaiso in a double-overtime grinder. Jaquan Johnson took over at the right time, and Bradley's depth of shot-makers held up through the chaos of late possessions.
bullets: Bradley beat Valparaiso 90-84 in double overtime.
Jaquan Johnson scored 18 points, with 6 coming in the second OT.
Ahmet Jonovic also scored 18 while adding 7 rebounds.
Alex Huibregtse hit a tying 3 with 25 seconds left in the first overtime.
JT Pettigrew had 24 points, 13 rebounds and 9 assists for Valparaiso in the loss.
games.context: The Braves advanced, but the workload and minutes from a double-OT game become a real factor with quick turnaround tournament scheduling.

games.headline: VCU snaps Dayton's six-game streak with late second-half control
games.brief: VCU walked into a tough road environment and controlled the key middle stretch of the second half to end Dayton's momentum. Lazar Djokovic set the tone early and the Rams' 11-3 run gave them separation they protected the rest of the way.
bullets: VCU beat Dayton 68-62 and ended the Flyers' six-game winning streak.
Lazar Djokovic scored 16 points and grabbed 6 rebounds.
VCU used an 11-3 second-half run to flip a two-point deficit into a 58-52 lead.
Javon Bennett led Dayton with 17 points.
The Rams improved to 24-7 overall and 15-3 in Atlantic 10 play.
games.context: This win helps VCU's postseason positioning and gives it a high-quality road result entering conference tournament week.

games.headline: Penn powers past Brown behind Roberts and balanced two-way effort
games.brief: Penn controlled this game with steadier half-court offense and cleaner execution over 40 minutes. Ethan Roberts and TJ Power led a balanced Quakers attack, while Brown never found enough perimeter rhythm to make a serious second-half push.
bullets: Ethan Roberts scored 18 points for Penn.
TJ Power added 17 points, 8 rebounds and 4 steals.
Penn won by 21 points on the road in Ivy League play.
Brown's Landon Lewis finished with 12 points and 11 rebounds.
The Quakers improved to 16-11 overall and 9-5 in conference.
games.context: Penn keeps itself in stronger Ivy positioning heading into the final stretch of league play.

highlights.title: Michigan State Spartans vs. Kentucky Wildcats | Full Game Highlights | ESPN College Basketball
Michigan State Spartans vs. Kentucky Wildcats | Full Game Highlights | ESPN College Basketball

games.headline: Toledo's offense explodes as Blyden Jr. delivers 20-13 masterclass
games.brief: Toledo put on an offensive clinic, carving Buffalo with pace and shot-making while piling up nearly 100 points. Sonny Wilson scored efficiently, but Leroy Blyden Jr.'s all-around creation was the real tone-setter in one of the league's best individual orchestrations of the night.
bullets: Toledo won 98-78 behind Sonny Wilson's 24 points.
Leroy Blyden Jr. had 20 points, 13 assists and 7 rebounds.
Mynor Strong added 18 points, including four made 3s.
Buffalo got 26 points from Ryan Sabol and 21 from Angelo Brizzi.
Toledo shot efficiently across its top scorers and kept control throughout.
games.context: Toledo's late-season offensive rhythm gives it upset potential in a conference tournament setting where guard play matters most.

games.headline: Harvard handles Columbia behind Pigge's 26 and steady interior control
games.brief: Harvard's frontcourt pressure and efficient scoring carried it to a comfortable home win over Columbia. Chandler Pigge set the tone with a high-usage scoring night, and the Crimson kept enough defensive structure to hold off every Columbia response.
bullets: Chandler Pigge scored 26 points and added 7 rebounds.
Robert Hinton contributed 17 points for Harvard.
Tey Barbour added 14 points, including three made 3s.
Columbia's Blair Thompson had 18 points and 8 rebounds in defeat.
Harvard improved to 17-11 overall and 10-4 in Ivy League play.
games.context: Harvard strengthened its Ivy tournament positioning with a result that was controlled from the middle stages onward.

highlights.title: UT Martin vs Florida State Game Highlights | 2025-26 ACC Men's Basketball

games.headline: West Virginia finishes UCF sweep behind Huff's 24-point close
games.brief: West Virginia closed its Big 12 regular season with a workmanlike win, pulling away after UCF made a second-half push. Honor Huff took over late with free throws and a key deep make, helping the Mountaineers create separation and complete the season sweep.
bullets: Honor Huff scored 24 points and went 10-for-10 at the free-throw line.
West Virginia completed a regular-season sweep of UCF.
UCF got within 44-40 with 12 minutes left, but a 9-1 West Virginia burst put the game away.
The Knights lost their third straight after a strong late-February stretch.
West Virginia finished 18-13 overall and 9-9 in Big 12 play.
games.context: The Mountaineers head into the Big 12 tournament with a stabilizing finish and momentum from a complete home win.

highlights.title: UCF vs. West Virginia Game Highlights | 2025-26 Big 12 Men’s Basketball
Fairfield at Penn State | HIGHLIGHTS | Big Ten Men's Basketball | 11/3/2025
Portland State vs. Colorado Game Highlights | 2025-26 Big 12 Men’s Basketball

games.headline: Presbyterian forces OT at the horn, then upsets Radford in quarterfinals
games.brief: Presbyterian looked headed home late, then authored one of the night's best tournament escapes. A buzzer-beating heave forced overtime, and the Blue Hose carried that momentum through the extra period to knock off Radford and keep their run alive.
bullets: Carl Parrish scored 23 points, including 6 in overtime.
Presbyterian forced OT on Parrish's 30-footer at the buzzer after Josh Pickett's late 3.
Jaylen Peterson added 20 points and 13 rebounds.
Chidi Chiakwelu was perfect from the field (8-of-8) and scored 18.
No. 6 seed Presbyterian advanced by upsetting No. 3 seed Radford.
games.context: In single-elimination conference play, this kind of late-game survival can completely reshape the bracket.
